scope: pilot validation — 1 character × 1 journey (public surface, no model calls)

findings.title: The 'are we on track to goal' card answers about a CLOSED past month, not 'this month'
findings.expected: Petra opens it mid-month (today 19 Jun) for a leadership check-in to see current-month pacing toward the revenue goal.
findings.got: The goal-pacing card shows May 2026 marked 'měsíc dokončen / Hotovo / měsíc uzavřen' at 185% of goal, with data 'k 31. května 2026' — a finalized prior month, ~3 weeks stale vs today, with no current-month pacing and only a small 'Data k 31. května' cue.
findings.code_check: present-but-not-exercised — GoalPacing has a seasonality-aware month-end forecast (context-map: Dashboard Workspace & KPIs), but the demo dataset ends on a clean month boundary so the card always shows a completed month; the forecast path is never hit. Gap is data-recency/framing, not a missing feature.
findings.suggested_acceptance: When viewed mid-month, the card shows current-month-to-date vs goal with the seasonality forecast, and a prominent 'as of <date>' staleness cue when data lags today.

findings.title: Per-channel 'ZMĚNA OBRATU' is identical (+8,9 %) for every channel — the column carries no channel-specific signal
findings.expected: Petra's job here is 'which channel is driving or dragging?' — she reads the change column to find the mover.
findings.got: Every channel row AND the total show exactly +8,9 %. A power user (Tomáš) would instantly distrust a column where all rows move identically.
findings.code_check: confirmed-by-design — ChannelTable.tsx:26-30 states each channel projects the totals by a constant share, so every channel's revenue delta equals the aggregate. The column is non-informative by construction, not a render bug.
findings.suggested_acceptance: Either vary channel shares over time in the seed so per-channel deltas genuinely differ, or remove/relabel the column so it does not imply channel-specific movement.

findings.title: 'Upozornění 175' — a 175-item anomaly list with dates outside the selected window and no prioritization
findings.expected: Actionable, prioritized exceptions (Petra's bar: signal, not noise).
findings.got: 175 alerts; listed events dated '1. 1.' and '1. 9.' fall outside the selected 90-day window (≈1 Mar–31 May); no worst-first ordering visible.
findings.suggested_acceptance: Verify the anomaly source respects the selected period and surfaces a small, ranked set; confirm date formatting.

findings.title: PNO 'Cíl 15 % splněn' vs insight 'PNO 13,9 % je pod cílem 15 %' may read as contradictory to a non-expert
findings.got: Both are correct (lower PNO is better, so 13,9 % < 15 % = good), but 'pod cílem' sounds negative next to 'splněn' for a reader who doesn't know PNO's good-direction.
findings.suggested_acceptance: Phrase PNO consistently with an explicit good-direction cue (e.g. 'pod cílem = lepší').

passed: Headline KPIs are a focused, deltaed set (~5 cards with period-over-period %) — meets the 5–10 actionable-KPI bar.
Deltas have an explicit baseline ('srovnání s předchozím stejně dlouhým obdobím') — clears her 'up vs WHAT?' pet peeve.
Channel breakdown reconciles to the headline totals (Náklady/Obrat/PNO/ROAS all tie) — clears her trust bar on levels.
Auto-insights ('Co stojí za pozornost') give 'so what' takeaways she could repeat in a meeting.
